arts.ttl: Derby County sent strong Portsmouth message after 'unacceptable' Stoke City thrashing
arts.sum: Portsmouth may have beaten Derby County to the League One title, but their return to the Championship reached a considerable low last night. Derby fans on X, formerly known as Twitter, had their say on the night as they drew comparisons with the Rams' own start to the season.

arts.ttl: Paul Warne will be tempted but stats may stop big call as Derby County XI v QPR predicted
arts.sum: Latest Derby County news from DerbyshireLive looks at the team that Warne could pick to face QPR at Pride Park on Saturday Derby County will hope Pride Park returns to being a fortress this weekend when they welcome QPR for their latest Championship assignment.

arts.ttl: Preview: Derby County vs. Queens Park Rangers - prediction, team news, lineups
arts.sum: Sports Mole previews Saturday's Championship clash between Derby County and Queens Park Rangers, including predictions, team news and possible lineups.
